name: app-code pre-write enforcement is tool-independent (native detector, no ESLint installed)
command:
printf 'const x: any = 1;
' > a.ts && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-file.sh" --file a.ts --include-app-code 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'detector=no-any.sh' e.txt && echo tool-independent-fullstack 1>&2
